'''Sonic rifles''' were the sonic analog to the [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], capable of striking targets from a greater range than the [[heavy sonic blaster]] while still maintaining the same damage.

==Description==
Sonic rifles tended to be less powerful than conventional [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], but they compensated for this by being more likely to pierce less advanced [[Personal energy shield/Legends|personal energy shields]] and disorienting their targets with sensory overload.

Like all [[Sonic weapon/Legends|sonic weapons]], the sonic rifle was particularly effective against [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] because the weapon could not be deflected by a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide" /> Additionally, the sonic damage was sometimes able to disrupt the target's equilibrium, causing disorientation.<ref name="KOTOR 2 Prima Official Guide" />

===Variants===
Variants of the sonic rifle included the [[SonoMax 100]], the [[SWE/2 sonic rifle/Legends|SWE/2 sonic rifle]], the [[Arkanian sonic rifle]], and the [[Sg-82 sonic rifle]].
